title: SP-PINN-RelativisticDynamics: Reference Implementation for Symmetry-Preserving Relativistic Charged-Particle Integration
description: Reproducibility package for the SP-PINN framework (Akintsov, Nevecheria, Yuan, Igumnov, Andreev, Qin; Symmetry, MDPI, 2026): field configurations; the Boris, RK4, DOP853, and Tao explicit symplectic integrators; the Stage-1 physics-informed neural-network training (including the vector-potential light-cone laser surrogate); and the methodological studies (order of convergence and the binding-constant Floquet resonances).
